name: Classic Mediterranean Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Tear the romaine lettuce and place it in a salad bowl.
2. Dice the tomatoes, slice the cucumber, green bell pepper, onion, radishes, and chop the parsley.
3. Add these ingredients to the bowl with the torn lettuce.
4. In a separate small bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, crushed garlic, salt, pepper, and mint until well combined.
5. Pour the dressing over the salad and toss gently to coat all ingredients evenly.
6. Serve immediately with warm pita halves.
